summary.title: LearningMore - File Management
summary.description: Threat model for the File Management component of the LearningMore platform, including upload of course materials, authorization checks, and download of protected files.

diagrams.title: File Management DFD Level 2

threats.title: Malicious file upload
threats.description: User uploads malicious file disguised as valid content
threats.mitigation: File type validation + antivirus scanning + size limits

threats.title: Unauthorized upload
threats.description: Student attempts to upload materials without permission

threats.title: Large file upload attack
threats.description: User uploads excessively large files to exhaust storage/resources

threats.title: Forged authentication token
threats.description: Attacker uses forged JWT to bypass access control

threats.title: Authorization bypass
threats.description: User accesses files without enrollment or permission

threats.title: Unauthorized metadata access
threats.description: Attacker retrieves file metadata without permission

threats.title: Unauthorized file download
threats.description: User downloads restricted files without authorization

threats.title: Metadata manipulation
threats.description: Attacker alters file permissions or ownership

threats.title: File modification
threats.description: Stored files are altered or replaced

threats.title: Direct file access
threats.mitigation: Store outside public directories + signed URLs

diagrams.description: DFD for File Management including upload, authorization validation, metadata handling, and file download.
